name: Kidd Roofing
homepage_text_excerpt: Kidd Roofing has been protecting Austin-area homes since 1982, offering residential and commercial roofing including new construction, re-roofing, and repair service. The company positions itself as a large, established regional contractor now also serving DFW, Houston, San Antonio, Denver, and Orlando. Messaging emphasizes decades of trusted craftsmanship, an A+ BBB rating, GAF partner status, and financing options for re-roofing and remodeling projects, including help for unexpected large jobs. Warranty coverage is highlighted as 10+ years on labor plus a lifetime manufacturer's warranty on materials. The site also promotes its role as the official roofing partner of Austin FC. NOTE: This excerpt is reconstructed from third-party search-result descriptions of the site, not a direct fetch of the live homepage text (WebFetch was unavailable in this session), so exact wording may differ from the actual page copy.

name: Bold Brothers Roofing
homepage_text_excerpt: Bold Brothers Roofing is a Denver-metro (Lakewood, CO) residential and commercial roofing company founded in May 2014 by brothers Nick and Scott Seibold. The company was named Forbes' #1 Roofing Contractor in Denver for 2024 and Top Rated Local's #1 roofing contractor in Colorado. Marketing emphasizes an A+ BBB rating with no complaints, a limited lifetime manufacturer warranty on shingles, and a five-year workmanship warranty on full roof installations. The About Us page names the founding brothers directly. NOTE: This excerpt is reconstructed from third-party search-result descriptions of the site, not a direct fetch of the live homepage text (WebFetch was unavailable in this session), so exact wording may differ from the actual page copy.

name: Adamson Roofing Company
homepage_text_excerpt: Adamson Roofing Company, LLC is a full-service roofing contractor headquartered in Smyrna, GA serving the greater Atlanta metro for more than 20 years. It markets itself as a GAF Master Elite Certified installer, CertainTeed ShingleMaster, and Owens Corning Preferred Contractor, with an A+ BBB rating and no filed complaints. Financing options are offered, and the site has dedicated pages for residential roofing and specific service areas across metro Atlanta. Customers describe the owner (Len) and crew favorably for professionalism, pricing, and workmanship. NOTE: This excerpt is reconstructed from third-party search-result descriptions of the site, not a direct fetch of the live homepage text (WebFetch was unavailable in this session), so exact wording may differ from the actual page copy.

name: Gibson Roofing
homepage_text_excerpt: Gibson Roofing, based in Damascus, OR, is one of the oldest roofing companies serving the Portland metro area, led by owner Steve Gibson. The site markets residential and commercial roofing, siding, gutters, windows, doors, and insulation. It has a dedicated service-areas page listing Portland, Clackamas, Milwaukie, Gresham, Boring, Sandy, Gladstone, Troutdale, Estacada, Lake Oswego, West Linn, Happy Valley, Beaverton, and Oregon City, a company-history/about page, a reviews page, and a contact page. As an Owens Corning Platinum Preferred Contractor, the company offers a Platinum warranty and financing options. name: Best Roofing Now
review_snippets: the price was not only good but the warranty is amazing and the roof looks GREAT!
homepage_text_excerpt: Best Roofing Now is a veteran-owned, family-owned roofing company based in Charlotte, NC, marketed as a reliable alternative to roofing scams. It is BBB A+ accredited and GAF Certified, with 500+ roofs installed and 64+ reviews at a 5.0 Google rating. The site promotes roof replacement, roof repair, free inspections, 24/7 emergency service, storm damage restoration, insurance claim assistance, gutter installation, and siding services, with transparent pricing and financing options, and has dedicated location-specific service pages for Charlotte. NOTE: This excerpt is reconstructed from third-party search-result descriptions of the site, not a direct fetch of the live homepage text (WebFetch was unavailable in this session), so exact wording may differ from the actual page copy.

name: Owl Roofing
review_snippets: did an excellent job with our roof and windows, and the entire experience was straightforward from the beginning. He communicated clearly, showed attention to detail, and delivered high-quality work.
homepage_text_excerpt: Owl Roofing LLC is a family-owned roofing company headquartered in Shoreview, MN, founded by Noah Bergland and Tim Brown, serving the Minneapolis/Twin Cities metro area. The company is BBB A+ accredited and a GAF Residential Roofers partner. It promotes a 10-year workmanship warranty alongside 50-year manufacturer warranties on roofing materials, and maintains an active blog covering roofing topics for various Twin Cities suburbs. Reviews describe the team as communicative, detail-oriented, and delivering high-quality work. NOTE: This excerpt is reconstructed from third-party search-result descriptions of the site, not a direct fetch of the live homepage text (WebFetch was unavailable in this session), so exact wording may differ from the actual page copy.

name: Lyons Roofing
homepage_text_excerpt: Lyons Roofing has served residential and commercial clients throughout Phoenix and Tucson since 1993, working on clay and concrete tile, asphalt and architectural shingles, cedar shake, spray polyurethane foam, modified bitumen, TPO, flat membrane, and metal roofing systems. The site has dedicated About Us, Meet the Team, Contact Us, and Customer Testimonials pages. Lyons is licensed under AZ ROC# 348074 and offers GreenSky financing with fast online approval, a workmanship guarantee covering installation/repair defects, and extended GAF manufacturer warranties on qualifying installations. NOTE: This excerpt is reconstructed from third-party search-result descriptions of the site, not a direct fetch of the live homepage text (WebFetch was unavailable in this session), so exact wording may differ from the actual page copy.

name: Bill Ragan Roofing Company
review_snippets: My claim was approved by the insurance company, and Bill Ragan made the process so easy. The roofing crew showed up when Bill Ragan said they would and did an outstanding job over the two-day period of installation.
homepage_text_excerpt: Bill Ragan Roofing Company has served Nashville and Middle Tennessee homeowners since 1990, offering residential roofing and repairs, light commercial repairs and re-roofs, diagnosis of difficult roof problems, storm damage repair, and skylight installation/repair. The site and Facebook page describe it as "Nashville's #1 Roofing Company - Licensed, Bonded & Insured," with a lifetime workmanship warranty and up to a 50-year warranty on certain systems. Financing is available through Advancial, including a 0% interest offer with 12-month deferred payments. NOTE: This excerpt is reconstructed from third-party search-result descriptions of the site, not a direct fetch of the live homepage text (WebFetch was unavailable in this session), so exact wording may differ from the actual page copy.

name: Ace Roofing
review_snippets: I couldn't be more pleased with Ace Roofing. I had a leak in my roof that was shutting down my furnace (unit is in the attic). The owner got me scheduled quickly and kept me informed via call when Steve would arrive. He quickly found and fixed the problem and also took photos to show me the repairs. This company is EXCELLENT in every way, and I highly recommend them.
homepage_text_excerpt: Ace Roofing (Ace Roofing Ltd.) has served the Columbus, Ohio metro area since 2009 as a BBB-accredited, licensed and bonded roofing contractor registered with the cities of Columbus, Upper Arlington, Grove City, Bexley, and Delaware. The company works on metal, tile, slate, shingle, and flat roofing for residential and commercial properties, and markets a leak warranty described as a full refund if a leak cannot be resolved after repeated repair attempts. Ratings referenced include a five-star Google rating and a 4.8-star Angi rating. NOTE: This excerpt is reconstructed from third-party search-result descriptions of the site, not a direct fetch of the live homepage text (WebFetch was unavailable in this session), so exact wording may differ from the actual page copy.

name: Straight Line Roofing & Construction
review_snippets: an amazing job, in both the quality and workmanship of the roof replacement and the incredible customer service
homepage_text_excerpt: Straight Line Roofing & Construction has served the greater Sacramento region, including Cameron Park, Shingle Springs, Rancho Cordova, and Roseville, since 1999, and is headed by third-generation contractor Jack Borba. The company reports over 15,000 satisfied customers and offers roofing, siding, gutters, solar installation, and windows. Marketing highlights a 4.9-star Google rating from 624 reviews, an A+ BBB rating, financing through Regions and Enerbank USA with low-interest, customizable payment options, and a labor warranty paired with a lifetime manufacturer's warranty on materials.
